articles.title: IOC lifts Olympics ban on Belarus but Russia 'still suspended'
articles.description: The IOC on Thursday lifted its ban on Belarusian athletes competing in the Olympics, although restrictions on Russian athletes remain in place. Competitors from Russia and their allies Belarus had been banned from international competition following Russia’s 2022 invasion of Ukraine, although some were permitted to compete as neutrals. READ: Olympics cannot exclude and divide says IOC amid Russian athletes row Russians will still only be able to compete in Olympic competition under the neutral banner, on an individual basis, and only if they have not actively supported the conflict. The IOC executive board released a statement saying that it [...]... Keep on reading: IOC lifts Olympics ban on Belarus but Russia 'still suspended'

articles.title: ‘Line ke bahar daal ...’: Rishabh Pant’s on-field masterplan removes Tim David in dramatic LSG win — Watch
articles.description: Rishabh Pant's sharp tactical advice proved pivotal in Lucknow Super Giants' narrow nine-run DLS victory over Royal Challengers Bengaluru. Caught on camera instructing spinner Shahbaz Ahmed, Pant's guidance led to the crucial dismissal of the dangerous Tim David. This breakthrough shifted momentum, ultimately helping LSG end their losing streak and revive playoff aspirations.
